name: Mrs Fields Gingersnaps
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, soda, salt, ginger, crystallized ginger, allspice, and pepper. Mix well and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, mix sugar and butter with an electric mixer on medium speed. Scrape down sides of the bowl.
4. Add egg and molasses, beating on medium speed until light and fluffy.
5. Add the flour mixture and mix on low speed just until combined.
6. Chill dough in the refrigerator for 1 hour—this will make it less sticky and easier to handle.
7. Form dough into balls about 1 inch in diameter.
8. Place cookies onto ungreased cookie sheets, 1 1/2 inches apart.
9. Bake 24-25 minutes.
10. Use a spatula to immediately transfer cookies to a cool, flat surface.
